title: Dockerfile
documentation:
## Purpose
Carries a Dockerfile that describes how to build a container image layer by layer. Dockerfiles are the primary artifact for reproducible containerization of applications and services.

## When to use
Use `media:dockerfile;textable` when a pipeline node builds, lints, or generates a Dockerfile — for example, a `docker build` executor node, a Hadolint analysis step, or an LLM node asked to containerize a given application.

## Notes
Dockerfiles have no standard file extension; the conventional filename is `Dockerfile` (no extension) or `Dockerfile.<variant>`. The `.dockerfile` extension registered here is used when the file must have an explicit extension. See also [Dockerfile](https://capdag.com/browse/media:dockerfile;textable).
